_comment: Copy this to memory-health.json and adjust as needed. CLI flags override all values here.
_index_file_comment: Path to the index/master file used to detect orphans. Set to null to skip orphan checks.
_max_age_days_comment: Files older than this many days receive a warning. Files 2x older receive critical.
_max_size_bytes_comment: Files larger than this receive a warning. Files 2x larger receive critical. 51200 = 50 KB.
_extensions_comment: File extensions to include in the scan.
_archive_subdir_comment: Subdirectory (inside memory_dir) where --fix moves archived files.
_review_file_comment: Filename (inside memory_dir) where --fix writes the contradiction review list.
